title: Full faithfulness eval + a11y/readability audit + staleness fail-safe verification + distribution runbook
context: Publication-readiness QA for the whole ewing-survivorship-late-effects library: faithfulness eval with expert spot-check, full accessibility/readability audit, staleness fail-safe verification, and a distribution runbook. HIGH risk-tier because it certifies patient-facing content; it confirms but never replaces the recorded dual sign-off (no patient-facing page ships without BOTH a credentialed pediatric/AYA oncologist AND a patient-advocate version-scoped sign-off (neither alone suffices)).
objective: Run the full faithfulness eval + accessibility/readability audit + staleness fail-safe verification across the set and write the distribution runbook.
acceptanceCriteria: Faithfulness eval across the whole set meets the agreed threshold with expert spot-check; any failing assertion is fixed or withheld
Full accessibility + readability audits pass; staleness fail-safe verified against a simulated guideline-version update (dependent assertions auto-flag/withhold + require re-dual-sign-off)
Distribution runbook written; every publish-candidate page has recorded dual sign-off
